title: State Secrets
description: The Guildmaster herself needs a favor. A magistrate in Dalhurst possesses documents detailing a secret royal decree that could destroy the Guild. Infiltrate the magistrate's offices, steal the documents, and escape. This is the most heavily guarded target you've faced.

objectives.description: Meet with inside contact to learn guard schedules
Escape with documents to Guild hideout

challenge.description: Multiple guards, magical wards, complex locks, time pressure

phases.name: escape
phases.description: Once documents taken, 3-minute timer before full lockdown

moral_choice.description: Reading the documents reveals the decree would actually legalize Guild operations. You can steal them for the Guild or leave them to help legitimize thieves.
moral_choice.evil_option: Steal documents - maintain Guild's shadow status

leave_documents.future_impact: Guild becomes semi-legal but loses underworld power

steal_documents.future_impact: Guild maintains criminal power, royal opposition continues

notes: Meets Guildmaster Nightshade. High-difficulty heist. Complex multi-phase challenge. Rewards Shadowstep Boots (mobility item). Magistrate offices in Dalhurst government district.
